arts.ttl: Arsenal dressing room reaction to Declan Rice's heroics speak volumes - 'Oh my God!'
arts.sum: Arsenal defeated Real Madrid 3-0 at the Emirates after Declan Rice produced two outstanding free kicks against Los Blancos to opened up the Gunners' advantage in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Spanish Media React to Declan Rice’s Performance During Arsenal 3-0 Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Spanish media have praised Declan Rice after his two free-kick goals helped Arsenal dismantle Real Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta issues Bukayo Saka injury update and explains Declan Rice substitution
arts.sum: The winger made his first start since December as the Gunners beat Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘aim high’: €120m offer for ‘remarkable’ Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Chelsea want to make Rodrygo their star summer signing and are ready to launch a €120 million bid for the Real Madrid and Brazil attacker, according to reports. Chelsea ‘aim high’: €120m offer for ‘remarkable’ Real Madrid star

arts.ttl: 'Every time': Spanish media couldn't believe what Bukayo Saka kept doing vs Real Madrid in Arsenal's 3-0 win
arts.sum: The Spanish media have been discussing Bukayo Saka’s kept doing vs ‘s performance against Real Madrid and noticed something he kept doing in Arsenal’s 3-0...

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice injury updates after Arsenal win over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Both players had to replaced in the 3-0 win but Mikel Arteta said he did not think either was serious

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois points finger of blame after being beaten by two Declan Rice free-kicks
arts.sum: Declan Rice stunned Real Madrid with two brilliant free-kicks in Arsenal’s Champions League quarter-final clash at the Emirates and Thibaut Courtois has now offered his thoughts

arts.ttl: Declan Rice’s free-kick double helps Arsenal to stunning win against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mikel Merino added a third to send the Emirates into dreamland ahead of next week’s return fixture.
